description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rust:latest Docker image with three stages: test, build, and publish. In the test stage add test_nightly and test_stable jobs that each run their respective preparation scripts (.prepare_nightly: echo 'Running nightly preparation...', rustup install nightly, rustup default nightly, rustup default > .toolchain; .prepare_stable: echo 'Running stable preparation...', rustup update, rustup default > .toolchain), then execute cargo check, cargo test, rustup component add clippy-preview, and cargo clippy, while caching the target directory with a key based on Cargo.lock. In the build stage add a build_nightly job that needs test_nightly and runs echo 'Building nightly release...' followed by cargo build --release, and a build_stable job that needs test_stable, runs echo 'Building stable release...' and cargo build --release, both using the same cache, with build_stable also publishing an artifact named kyanite from target/release/kyanite. Add a crates_io job in the publish stage that needs build_stable, runs only on tags of lu-ci/kyanite, and executes echo 'Publishing to crates.io...' and cargo publish --token "$CRATES_IO_API_TOKEN".
